Package com.wip.controller

package com.wip.controller
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.wip
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AuthController
    Spring MVC controller that manages user authentication and registration flows.
    CustomerController
    REST controller for managing customers in the Courier Tracking System.
    CustomerUiController
    Thymeleaf UI controller for managing customer records in the Courier Tracking System.
    ErrorPageController
    Spring MVC controller that serves dedicated HTTP error pages for the Courier Tracking System.
    HomeController
    Spring MVC controller that handles the home page, root redirect, and dashboard views.
    ParcelController
    REST controller for managing parcel bookings in the Courier Tracking System.
    ParcelUiController
    Thymeleaf UI controller for managing parcel bookings in the Courier Tracking System.
    ProfileController
    Spring MVC controller that manages the user profile view and edit flows.
    SearchController
    Spring MVC controller that handles the global search feature of the Courier Tracking System.
    ShipmentController
    REST controller for managing shipments in the Courier Tracking System.
    ShipmentUiController
    Thymeleaf UI controller for managing shipments in the Courier Tracking System.
    TrackingUpdateController
    REST controller for managing tracking updates associated with shipments.
    TrackingUpdateUiController
    Thymeleaf UI controller for managing shipment tracking updates.
